text:
Matt Dillon has kindly answered to my email and has submitted a new 
version of cpdup which should be fix the problem. I am working on the 
new port, but not before the January 09 2007.

Ciaooo


Best Regards,
Gianmarco Giovannelli ,  "Unix expert since yesterday"
